verification.title: Verify your email address
verification.body: Thank you for signing up! Please verify your email address by clicking the button below.
verification.expires: This link will expire in {{hours}} hours.
verification.ignore: If you didn't create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

password_reset.title: Reset your password
password_reset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password.
password_reset.expires: This link will expire in {{hours}} hours.
password_reset.ignore: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

welcome.title: Welcome to {{appName}}
welcome.body_intro: Thank you for joining {{appName}}! We're excited to have you as part of our community.
welcome.feature_3: Protect your accounts with multi-factor authentication
welcome.get_started: Get started by exploring your account dashboard.

security_alert.title: Security Alert - {{alertType}}
security_alert.body: We detected a security event on your {{appName}} account.
security_alert.not_you: If this was not you, please secure your account immediately.

new_session.title: New Login Detected
new_session.body: A new login to your {{appName}} account was detected.
new_session.not_you: If this was not you, please change your password immediately and review your account security.

new_device_otp.title: Verify New Device
new_device_otp.body: We detected a login attempt from a new device to your {{appName}} account. Enter this code to verify it's you:
new_device_otp.not_you: If you didn't attempt to log in, please ignore this email and change your password immediately.

footer.contact: If you have any questions, please contact us at {{email}}
